name: ranged_quote
input: Hi - rough numbers for that Denver L&D role: pay range $34 to $38/hr depending on experience, weekly stipends combined $1800 to $2000. 13 weeks starting around 9/15. Day shifts. BLS + NRP required.

expected.raw_notes: Hourly range $34-$38 (used midpoint $36). Combined weekly stipends $1800-$2000 stated; not broken down by housing/meals/travel so left null.
